name: Bot Command Set rewrite + /start natural-input hint
description: Rewrite the bot Command Set descriptions in the spec for clarity, and surface the Auto-detect behavior on /start so users learn once that they can send a free-form expense message without /ai.

planned: Inline plan: rewrite Command Set table + add Auto-detect subsection, add Main Menu hint, edit start.ts response, add test, no scope expansion.
done: Spec Command Set table: /start, /ai, /stats, /budget, /top, /settings, /help descriptions rewritten to be more informative and action-oriented.
Spec adds Auto-detect subsection under Command Set explaining that /ai is optional in private chat for linked users.
Spec Main Menu section adds a one-line tip line documenting the natural-input hint shown to linked users on /start.
apps/worker/src/bot/commands/start.ts: linked-user response now ends with '💬 Mẹo: gửi thẳng tin nhắn chi tiêu (vd: "ăn bún 30k") — bot tự phân tích, không cần /ai.'
Unlinked-user /start response unchanged (still 'Mở Mini App' guidance only).
Test added: 'includes natural-input hint for linked user' asserts 'không cần /ai' is in the text.

notes: Pre-existing spec/code discrepancy: spec Main Menu lists '👥 Gia đình' but current code has only 4 action buttons + Mở Mini App. Out of scope for this task — left for a follow-up.
